description: A list of academic publications, each with author details, a title link, journal citation, optional repository link, and export download icons for RIS and BibTeX formats.

props.name: items
props.type: Array<{ authors: string; titleHref: string; title: string; journal: string; volumeAndPages?: string; wrroHref?: string; risExportHref?: string; bibtexExportHref?: string }>

stories.name: Default
stories.description: A single publication with both RIS and BibTeX export links

items.authors: Westwater B, Lloyd H, Vitorica-Yrzebal I, Fong A, McMaster P, Sloan M, Coaker B, Pulham CR & Portius P (2020)
items.title: Synthesis and characterization of the mixed-ligand coordination polymer Cu3Cl(N4C-NO2)2

stories.name: MultipleItems
stories.description: Multiple publications, some with WRRO links and some without

items.authors: Kerrigan K, Phadnis VA, M'Saoubi R & Scaife RJ (2025)
items.title: Critical damage modes in high-performance drilling of carbon fibre reinforced epoxy composites

items.authors: Seward O, Cepero-Mejías F, Fairclough JPA & Kerrigan K (2022)
items.title: Development of a novel friction model for machining simulations in unidirectional composite materials

stories.name: NoExportLinks
stories.description: Publication items without export icon links

items.title: An example publication title for a journal article

notes: Each list item renders: a span.author with author string, an anchor link for the publication title (opens in _top), a cite element with journal name, optional volume/pages text, an optional WRRO repository link, and optional RIS and BibTeX export icon links using /themes/custom/uos_public/images/ris-icon.png and bibtex-icon.png respectively. Export icons always have class export-icon.
